title: Parental socioeconomic status and the timing of first marriage: What is the role of unmarried cohabitation? Results from a cross-national comparison
abstract: Previous research has shown that individuals from high-status families enter marriage later than those from low-status families. However, in many Western societies, it has become common to cohabit prior to marriage. Does this change the link between parent
authors_text: Brons, M. D. (Anne); Liefbroer, Aart C.; Ganzeboom, Harry B. G.
